enforce_tdd.rationale: Model writes code before tests under time/context pressure, bypassing TDD discipline
enforce_tdd.removal_criteria: Model consistently writes tests first across 50+ sessions without enforcement

enforce_orchestrator.rationale: Model bypasses pipeline steps when context is large or task seems simple
enforce_orchestrator.removal_criteria: Model follows full pipeline sequence without enforcement across 50+ sessions

unified_prompt_validator.rationale: Model misinterprets or produces invalid prompt format without validation
unified_prompt_validator.removal_criteria: Model generates correct prompt format 99%+ of the time without validation

plan_mode_exit_detector.rationale: Model exits plan mode prematurely and begins implementation without approval
plan_mode_exit_detector.removal_criteria: Model reliably stays in plan mode until explicit user approval across 50+ sessions

validate_command_file_ops.rationale: Model directly edits infrastructure files (hooks, agents, commands) bypassing the /implement pipeline
validate_command_file_ops.removal_criteria: Model never directly edits infrastructure files without /implement across 50+ sessions

stop_quality_gate.rationale: Model declares work done prematurely before all quality checks pass
stop_quality_gate.removal_criteria: Model consistently completes all quality checks before declaring done across 50+ sessions

security_scan.rationale: Security scanning is always required regardless of model capability

auto_format.rationale: Code formatting is a team-level standard, not a model behavior issue

auto_test.rationale: Automated test execution is a standard engineering practice

session_activity_logger.rationale: Session logging is an audit trail requirement independent of model behavior

validate_project_alignment.rationale: Alignment validation ensures work matches PROJECT.md goals, model-independent

validate_session_quality.rationale: Session quality validation is a standard quality assurance practice

unified_pre_tool.rationale: Multi-layer security enforcement (MCP, sandbox, auth) is infrastructure

unified_session_tracker.rationale: Session state tracking is operational infrastructure, not model-dependent

auto_fix_docs.rationale: Automatic documentation sync is a process standard

task_completed_handler.rationale: Pipeline orchestration and task completion handling is infrastructure

genai_prompts.rationale: GenAI prompt templates are infrastructure for LLM-as-judge testing

genai_utils.rationale: GenAI utility functions are infrastructure for LLM-as-judge testing

conversation_archiver.rationale: Conversation archiving is an analytics and audit trail requirement independent of model behavior

implement.md:pre-staged-check.rationale: Git hygiene — checking for pre-staged files is model-independent

implement.md:alignment.rationale: Strategic alignment validation is a process standard

implement.md:test-gate.rationale: 100% test pass rate is an engineering standard

implement.md:no-new-skips.rationale: Model games skip markers to pass test gates without fixing failures
implement.md:no-new-skips.removal_criteria: Model never adds @pytest.mark.skip to bypass test failures across 50+ sessions

implement.md:anti-stubbing.rationale: Model replaces broken code with NotImplementedError stubs under pressure
implement.md:anti-stubbing.removal_criteria: Model consistently writes real implementations without stubbing across 50+ sessions

implement.md:hook-registration.rationale: Hook registration wiring is an operational requirement

implement.md:agent-count.rationale: Model skips required agents under context pressure to save tokens
implement.md:agent-count.removal_criteria: Model invokes all required agents without enforcement across 50+ sessions

implement.md:reviewer-completion-sequent.rationale: Model parallelizes reviewer and security-auditor when sequential ordering is required
implement.md:reviewer-completion-sequent.removal_criteria: Model reliably sequences validation agents without enforcement across 50+ sessions

implement.md:remediation-gate.rationale: Remediation fallback mechanism is a pipeline safety net

implement.md:doc-drift.rationale: Documentation drift detection is a documentation sync standard

implement.md:doc-congruence.rationale: Documentation congruence validation is a documentation accuracy standard

implement.md:ci-analyst-launch.rationale: Post-pipeline analysis launch is a continuous improvement process

implementer.md:no-new-skips.rationale: Model adds @pytest.mark.skip to game test gates instead of fixing tests
implementer.md:no-new-skips.removal_criteria: Model never adds skip markers to bypass failures across 50+ sessions

implementer.md:regression-test.rationale: Regression testing for bug fixes is an engineering standard

implementer.md:hook-registration.rationale: Hook registration verification is an operational wiring requirement

implementer.md:remediation-discipline.rationale: Model weakens or broadens code during fix-only remediation passes
implementer.md:remediation-discipline.removal_criteria: Model scopes remediation fixes narrowly without weakening code across 50+ sessions

reviewer.md:test-before-approve.rationale: Verification before approval is a standard review practice

reviewer.md:read-only.rationale: Model writes or modifies code during what should be a read-only review
reviewer.md:read-only.removal_criteria: Model never modifies files during review across 50+ sessions

security-auditor.md:owasp-checklist.rationale: Systematic OWASP security checklist is a security standard

doc-master.md:covers-scan.rationale: Model skips systematic documentation scan and goes directly to writing
doc-master.md:covers-scan.removal_criteria: Model consistently performs covers: scan before writing docs across 50+ sessions

doc-master.md:doc-drift-verdict.rationale: Model omits the required structured verdict output from doc-drift checks
doc-master.md:doc-drift-verdict.removal_criteria: Model consistently outputs structured verdict in correct format across 50+ sessions

implement.md:coordinator-forbidden.rationale: Model skips pipeline steps, summarizes instead of executing, declares good-enough on failures
implement.md:coordinator-forbidden.removal_criteria: Model follows coordinator duties without any forbidden behavior across 50+ sessions

implementer.md:no-new-skips.rationale: Model adds skip decorators to game test gates rather than fixing failures
implementer.md:no-new-skips.removal_criteria: Model resolves test failures through fixing or adjusting, never skipping, across 50+ sessions

reviewer.md:no-write.rationale: Model modifies code files during review instead of staying read-only
reviewer.md:no-write.removal_criteria: Model never writes to code files during review across 50+ sessions

security-auditor.md:no-skip-categories.rationale: Systematic coverage of all OWASP categories is a security standard

doc-master.md:covers-first.rationale: Model skips the systematic covers: scan and jumps to writing documentation
doc-master.md:covers-first.removal_criteria: Model consistently runs covers: scan before writing docs across 50+ sessions
